subcodes.first_line: Know thou that existence hath a center round which revolve the spheres of eternal life upon that mighty Center; whensoever thou attainest unto that Center [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اعلمی انّ للوجود مرکز تدور افلاک الحيات الابديّة علی ذلک المرکز العظيم فمتی وصلت الی ذلک المرکز
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @unity of existence [wahdatu'l-wujud], @soul; spirit after death
